group_1.textLeft: Yuu... You're not getting away this time!

group_1.textRight: ...Ah! Kuroe-san!!

group_1.textLeft: What are you doing here...?

group_1.textRight: I-I've been looking for you, you know?!
You were nowhere to be seen when the two of us@woke up...!

group_1.textLeft: Ah... Yeah, good point...

group_1.textRight: I made the right choice, tagging along with@Nagisa-san to look for Yuu-san!
I am SO glad to know you're safe!

group_1.textLeft: Uh... Sorry. For making you worry, I mean...

group_1.textRight: You have to give this up, Yuu...
No, Yumeno Yuusa!

group_1.textLeft: Who's that?

group_1.textRight: Yumeno Yuusa.
The woman who threw herself from the cliff@with Seto Kei and came out the sole survivor.

group_1.textLeft: I'm Yuu, though?
(Was the Kei-san I saw in my dream real after all,@then?)

group_1.textRight: I jumped through a lot of hoops to learn more@about you after we first met.
(By which I mean I just asked Homura to fill@me in...)

group_1.textLeft: Are you saying that Yuu-san has amnesia?

group_1.textRight: She does.
Yumeno Yuusa lost her memory...
...and became the "Sleepwalking Ghost" called@Yuu.
And that turned her into a Hotsure— a frayed@thread— in this universe.
Once something becomes a Hotsure, it can't be@restored.
The only way to get rid of it is to snip it off.
But even so...
...if Yuu regains her memories and stops being@the Sleepwalking Ghost, then maybe...
Um... I know I already asked before we came@here...
...but what exactly is a "Hotsure"?

group_1.textLeft: Hotsure are...

group_1.narration: "Anomalies that can only occur in this universe,@separated from the Law of Cycles,@which will lead to the worst possible future—@one that's completely unsalvageable.@"Hotsure" is the term I came up with for them."

group_1.textRight: "Lawful Bicycles?"

group_1.textLeft: The worst possible future...?
Mm, I don't really get it...
I've gotta go get rid of bad guys.
Can we do this later?

group_1.textRight: No siree!
[flashEffect:flashWhiteSlow2](I still don't fully understand the nature of Yuu's@magic.)
(If my mind doesn't get overwhelmed, though...)
(...then I shouldn't be affected by it...probably.)
What did you wish for when you became a@Magical Girl?

group_1.textLeft: Um... I forgot.

group_1.textRight: You were the only one who survived. Even though@you could've had any wish granted...
...if Seto Kei was determined to cling to@"The End"...
...she wouldn't have wanted to be revived.
So instead, you wished to lose your sanity.

group_1.textLeft: Really? Is that true?

group_1.textRight: The reason you didn't wish to kill yourself was@because...
...you couldn't bear the idea of the real Seto Kei—@who lives on in your memories—
...disappearing from this world.
That hasn't been rewritten by someone's sweet@nothings.
The memories of the real Seto Kei are still@inside you!
Look into the empty pit in your soul...
...and you'll find her!
Remember who you are and move forward@to tomorrow.
You're not betraying anything by going beyond@"The End."
Forgetting what you lost doesn't make you@heartless.

group_1.textLeft: Hmm... I'm completely lost. What a pain,@what a pain...
YUU! Don't listen to her! Your name is Yuu!

group_1.textRight: [chara:200700:effect_emotion_angry_0][se:7219_strain]Waugh! Who the heck are you?! Don't butt in!

group_1.textLeft: "Yumeno Yuusa" is nowhere to be found@anymore!
The person standing right here is Yuu!

group_1.textCenter: I ain't got a clue what started it, but buttin' heads@is what youth is all about.

group_1.textRight: Nn?

group_1.textCenter: I never woulda guessed that a buncha young@ladies like you would be body brokers...
This old coot feels like he just wandered into@a clubroom after school.

group_1.textRight: Who are these guys? Are they here to check@the gas meters or something?
They're those door-to-door bible pushers,@probably?

group_1.textLeft: I don't know you, do I? What lowbrow outfits@you're all wearing.
What do you want?

group_1.textRight: I'm the boss of them part-timers you guys@stomped out.
Well, it seems like you've "processed" a few of@our employees before...
Part-timers? Employees?

group_1.textLeft: He's referring to the people you "got rid of,"@I believe?

group_1.textRight: Ah! That'd make sense. Were you friends with@those bad guys?
More importantly...
Do you seriously think WE'RE buddies with Yuu?

group_1.textLeft: Huh? But I thought you were my friend,@Nagisa-chan.

group_1.textRight: Don't lump me in with you freaks!@Kuroe, you tell her, too!

group_1.textLeft: M-me? ...Huh? What am I supposed to say?

group_1.textRight: [chara:104700:effect_shake]*Trembling*@[wait:1.0](Terrified of these scary people.)
Hahaha. It's good to see the youths so feisty.
Anyway, I've been wonderin'.
Are you girls really body brokers?

group_1.textLeft: Yep! It'd be a waste to just get rid of the bad@guys I take out.
Might as well give them to people who want@them!

group_1.textCenter: You bitch! If you don't stop talkin' nonsense...

group_1.textRight: "Bad guys," eh... So if someone's a bad person,@there's no gettin' around it?

group_1.textLeft: I mean, yeah? Bad people do bad things, right?

group_1.textRight: Well, sure, but the guys you killed... They were all@ordinary people, weren't they?

group_1.textLeft: Ordinary people?

group_1.textRight: Just regular folks gettin' used...
Real pitiful fellas who got little favors granted...
...in exchange for a lifetime of abuse from scary@people.
If nothin' else, they ain't the bad guys here.

group_1.textLeft: Is that so? Do you think that's true?
Does it not make you a bad person if you hurt@other people because somebody asked you to?
Is it "okay" to take something away from@someone...
...just because you have no other choice?
Feeling sorry for bad people doesn't make them@any less bad, you know?

group_1.textRight: ...Ya got a point.
But even if someone really did fuck up big time...
...that doesn't mean ya gotta rob 'em...
...of the chance to make up for what they did,@does it?
I ain't gonna say "vigilantism is illegal" or nothin'@boneheaded like that...
But thanks to you guys...
...those poor chumps are gonna be branded as@criminals forever.

group_1.textLeft: If they truly wanted to change...
...don't you think that they would have done so@already?
They're bad guys, and yet they still want to be@punished.
It's not good to be selfish, you know?

group_1.textRight: Heartless, ain'tcha?
If ya wanna execute "bad guys"...
...shouldn't ya try to be a more stand-up fella?

group_1.textLeft: Ah, um, I think you might've misunderstood...
I'm really not a good person?
Shii asked me to do this, so I've got a fair reason@for it...
...but bad things are still bad, you know?
This doesn't handwave the awful things I do.

group_1.textCenter: (No matter how much I try to dig up on these@body brokers...)
(...all I can find is info about a shady seminar@group that disappeared en masse.)
(...and "Delete everythin' before the cops get@involved. Bury it all.")
(...with how ballsy these nutcases are,@they probably ain't lyin'.)
(...but could these guys be even more dangerous@than just sellin' corpses?)

group_1.textRight: I still can't believe it...
I thought stone-cold killers like you only existed@in movies...

group_1.textLeft: So YOU find the way WE act upsetting and@confusing, now?
Isn't that rich.
I can't count how many times you've slaughtered@me in my dreams...

group_1.textRight: Hahahaha.
If I was 20 years younger, a line like that woulda@made me fall for ya.
Oi, fellas, don't let these ladies leave here alive!
